free_text: Fast neutron elastic and inelastic scattering cross
sections of 54Fe
Sov.At.Energy - translation from AE
Cylindrical Fe-54(enriched to 89.5%) sample had a mass
of 87.53 g, it was 3.8 cm high and 2.3 cm in diameter.
Flight path 2.7 m
Electrostatic Accelerator EG-5
Cylindrical Stilbene crystal 5x5 cm
following corrections were made:
* on anisotropy in yield of neutrons from target,
* beam attenuation in sample,
* multiple scattering and angular discrimination.
Total uncertainty included all experimental
uncertainties:
* statistics of measurements and handling,
* uncertainty in normalization;
* uncertainties of used oxygen cross sections
UkrNDC
Approved by I.A.Korzh (2009-12-11)
